name: JMeter Studio - Theme Engine Plugin for Apache JMeter
description: A modern, extensible theme engine for Apache JMeter featuring both dark and light themes with custom icon sets

Jmeter plugin to effectively manage CSV dataset like other enterprise industry standard tools.
  • Simply add a "Config Element " and Set the appropriate options
  • Usage Guide
  • Author Details
name: Extended CSV dataset config
Datadog Backend Listener
description: Send JMeter test results to Datadog

1.0.0.changes: Cumulative metrics, statistics calculation modes, assertion metrics, test run events

name: vdn@github - har-convertor-jmeter-tool
description: Convert a HAR file to a JMeter Script and a Record XML file.

3.2.changes: Remove the header Content-length because the length is computed by JMeter when the request is created. POST or PUT could have query string and body with content so add query string to the path. Set Content Encoding to UFT-8 for POST or PUT method and request Content-Type:application/json. Add body data content in record.xml for PUT and PATCH methods. encode value for x-www-form-urlencoded when value contains space, equal, slash or plus characters.

5.0.changes: Add an external csv file with transaction information for JMeter Transaction Controller Name. Add compatibility with HAR generated with LoadRunner Web Recorder Chrome Extension. Correct Filter Include first filter and Filter Exclude second filter

5.1.changes: Compatible with har generated by browsermob-proxy tool.

5.2.changes: Correct extract parameters for mime type 'form-urlencoded' ended with charset likes 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=xxx'

6.0.changes: Add View Result Tree to view the recording xml file

6.1.changes: Correct a NullPointerException when creating the Recording XML file.

7.0.changes: Add manage the websocket connection and messages with 'WebSocket Samplers by Peter Doornbosch', add checkbox for boolean parameter 'ws_with_pdoornbosch' .

7.1.changes: Remove request headers from HTTP/2, these headers start with ':' likes ':authority' or ':scheme', don't create HttpSampler for url 'data:'

8.0.changes: Add new parameter 'remove_headers' remove a list of http headers (comma separator, case insensitive), e.g:'User-Agent,Pragma'

9.1.changes: Add new parameter 'jackson_parser_string_max' to change default Jackson String length size (default integer size 20000000) for processing very large JSON, need jackson libraries>=2.16.1 to avoid conflict with JMeter and Saxon-HE>=12.3 for better performance

10.0.changes: External file could be a JSON file created with 'HAR Transaction Marker' Chrome Plugin or CSV file

name: WebSocket Samplers by Peter Doornbosch
description: Provides 6 samplers for load testing WebSocket applications. Use the WebSocket request-response sampler for testing a basic request-response flow (the most common case), or combine the other samplers to support a more sophisticated WebSocket test scenario.

0.9.changes: Single read sampler can be made optional, which avoids the sampler to fail when no websocket frame is received; this is useful in test scenario's where you can not exactly predict the server's behavior.

0.10.changes: New feature: frame filters. To handle situations in which the server sends unsolicited messages and the occurrence of such messages is hard to predict or otherwise hard to take into account in the test plan, filters can be used to discard such messages before they are seen by a sampler.

0.11.1.changes: New feature: you can control what's happening with the websocket connections at the end of the test: leave open (default), close on websocket level or close on tcp level, by setting JMeter property websocket.thread.stop.policy. Fix: all result viewers will now correctly show the size of received bytes. Frame payload is counted as 'body', frame headers as 'headers'. By default, filtered frames do not contribute to 'received size', but this can be changed by setting JMeter property websocket.result.size_includes_filtered_frames.

1.0.changes: New feature: registers size of sent messages too. Requires JMeter version 3.1 or later!

1.1.changes: Ready for / compatible with JMeter 4. New feature: send unsolicited pong.

1.2.changes: Improved ping/pong filtering and added option to read (binary) payload data from file

1.2.2.changes: Improved memory usage for receiving binary messages

1.2.7.changes: Fixed bug about not always correctly reading frame under heavy load in combination with short read timeouts, and some other minor bug fixes.

1.2.8.changes: Added option to Single Read Sampler to read Text OR Binary, whatever is received.

1.2.9.changes: Increased max read timeout; added data type for simplifying handling STOMP protocol messages.

1.2.10.changes: Merge header managers when present, use Java 8 as before.

1.3.changes: Added support for deflate/uncompress websocket messages (RFC 7692).

1.3.1.changes: Fixed bug (ClassCastException when reading unexpected frame in request-response sampler)

1.3.2.changes: Fixed bug (memory leak due to repeated merging of Header Manager)

name: ISO-8583 Sampler
description:
Generate ISO-8583 financial transactions for testing of payment gateways and switches
With support for cryptogram calculation (PIN Block, MAC, ARQC)
Based on the jPOS framework

1.1.changes:
• Upgrade to jPOS v2.1.4
  • Fire-and-forget messages
  • Non-persistent Channel option
  • Advanced Mux options to configure response/request matching
  • Non-message related cryptographic functions
  • Packager logging
  • Multiple success response codes
  • ARQC transaction data overriding, custom padding, and automatic CVR extraction
  • Bug fixes: #2
  • Incompatible changes:
    • ISO8583 Crypto PreProcessor: Transaction Data field now overrides the ARQC input instead of appending
    • ISO8583 Config: renamed to ISO8583 Connection Configuration

1.2.changes:
• Upgrade to jPOS v2.1.6
  • Round-robin selection for multiple connections in server mode
  • Optional reference ID for explicitly linking Sampler to Connection Config
  • Request Listener script option to handle incoming messages (0800 network management)
  • Bug fixes: #30, #32

1.3.changes:
• Upgrade to jPOS v2.1.8
  • Bug fixes: #24
  • Incompatible changes:
    • ISO8583 Config: Request Listener script now Groovy instead of BeanShell
    • ISO8583 Crypto PreProcessor: Removed some ARQC settings that are now derived automatically from Issuer Application Data (Session Key Derivation Method, jmeter.iso8583.arqcInputTags, jmeter.iso8583.arqcFromFullIADForCVNs)

1.4.changes:
• Upgrade to jPOS v2.1.10
  • Automatic ARQC padding
  • Bug fixes: #77

1.3.3.changes: Sampler now supports Header/Cookie/Auth Manager, reports response headers, and handles binary attachments.

name: Baolu-csv-data-file-config
description:
• This plug-in supports automatic or manual csv data allocation for each thread.It has a similar LoadRunner capability parameterization.
  • If your request involves database update operation, using this plug-in in the test script can avoid lock waiting and improve the reliability of test results.

1.2.1.changes: Fix the bug that the file cannot be found in the relative directory.

1.2.2.changes:
• Format log output,remove unnecessary log printing to improve performance.
  • Completely solve the problem that the relative directory of the parameter file cannot be read.

1.2.4.changes:
• Fix null pointer exception in distributed mode.
  • Resolve Chinese garbled code.
  • Solving the bug of multithreaded groups with the same parameter values in distributed mode.

name: AWS Support
description: AWS Meter is a comprehensive JMeter plugin designed to execute performance tests against AWS services including Kinesis, SQS, SNS, Cognito, and EventBridge. This plugin provides specialized Java samplers for each AWS service, leveraging the AWS SDK for seamless integration and communication.

1.0.0.changes: Publish data records in Kinesis Data Stream and Produce messages in SQS Standard or FIFO queue.

2.0.0.changes: Publish messages in SNS Standard or FIFO topic.

2.1.1.changes: Get AWS session token from the credentials file and SNS Java Sampler Client bug fix.

3.0.0.changes: Add Cognito sampler and bug fix to get aws credentials from JMeter Java Sampler parameters.

4.0.0.changes: Update java, gradle and dependencies versions, and support for Localstack with custom endpoints.

4.1.1.changes: Get AWS credentials from EC2 instance profile and ECS task IAM role.

name: Validate Thread Group
description: Adds Validation Thread Group option to the toolbar

name: Feather Wand - JMeter AI Agent
description: Add AI Agent to JMeter

1.0.4.changes: Add navigation buttons to the chat panel

1.0.5.changes:
Say hello to these new features:
  • Navigation buttons
  • AI driven element renaming using @lint command
  • Refactor your Groovy scripts using @code command

1.0.6.changes:
Say hello to these new features:

  • `wrap` your HTTP elements inside Transaction Controllers

1.0.7.changes:
Say hello to these new features:

1.0.8.changes: Nothing but bug fixes and polished logs

1.0.9.changes:
Say hello to these new features:
  • Refactor your code right inside JSR223 elements by right-clicking.
  • Minor fixes and enhancements

1.0.10.changes:
Say hello to these new features:
  • Intellisense in the chat panel for `@` commands.
  • Display version information in the chat panel.

2.0.0.changes: NEW: Claude Code integration for real agentic experience

2.0.1.changes: Minor fix: macOS launch. NEW: Claude Code integration for real agentic experience.

2.0.2.changes: NEW: Support for Ollama models. Now you can run the agent locally with your custom or open-source models using Ollama. For more details, check out our documentation:

2.0.3.changes: FIX: Dark/Light theme conflicts. Shiny upgrade to the UI. NEW: Support for Ollama models. For more details, check out our documentation:

name: DG - JMeter Names Templater
description: Jmeter Names Templater is a plugin for Jmeter that allows you to set naming templates for elements and rename them based on a described configuration file.

1.2.changes:
searchOut[1] and searchOut[2] now accept variables
rename-config.yaml should now be in the same directory as jmx

1.1.changes: The yaml config file is used for templates

name: HTTP Form Manager
description:
This plugin makes JMeter behave a little more like a browser: form fields are automatically populated with preselected values.
  • No more manual correlation of hidden inputs, such as session variables.
  • Just correlate parameters that actually relate to user input.

name: Kafka backend listener
description:
Apache JMeter plugin for sending sample results to a Kafka server.
  • Simply add a "Backend Listener" and change the implementation
  • Change the listener's configuration
  • To use filters, simply separate their name by a semicolon. (f1;f2;f3)

name: JMeter Listener pack
description:
This JMeter Plugin allows to write load test data on-the-fly to ClickHouse (as well as InfluxDB, ElasticSearch, with additional feature: aggregation of Samplers)
Explanations and usage examples on project wiki.
Dashboards for ClickHouse.

1.7.changes: New ClickHouse table scheme jmresults(buffer)->jmresults_data(ops storage with extended data request/response)->jmresults_statistic(mat view as archive storage). New field (hostname) in stats

name: WS Security for SOAP
description: Digital signature, encryption, decryption, timestamp and username token for SOAP messages via Pre/Post-Processors that modify sampler payloads/responses.

1.4.changes: Added support for decryption of response messages

1.5.changes: Added WSS Timestamp Pre-Processor. Added WSS UsernameToken timestamp precision option and 'no password' option.

1.6.changes:
• Support for signing/encrypting/decrypting attachments
  • Upgrade to wss4j v2.2
  • Support for TCP Sampler, SMTP Sampler
  • New options:
    • Header: Actor, mustUnderstand
    • Parts to Sign/Encrypt: ID
  • Removed options:
    • Signature algorithm http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmldsig-more#rsa-ripemd160
    • Digest algorithm http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#ripemd160
    • Key encryption algorithm http://www.w3.org/2001/04/xmlenc#rsa-oaep-mgf1p

1.7.changes:
• SOAP Message Signer: Support for symmetric signature (HMAC)
  • SOAP Message Decrypter: Support for multiple decryption keys
  • Default keystore type is now JCEKS (compatible with JKS and PKCS12)
  • Bug fixes
  • Incompatible changes:
    • SOAP Message Decrypter: Private Key Password field removed (use Credentials table instead)

1.8.changes:
• Upgrade to wss4j v2.3.1
  • Configurable keystore type (JCEKS/JKS/PKCS12)
  • Bug fixes

1.9.changes: Maintenance release: Upgrade to wss4j v3.0.0

name: JUnit Reporter
description:
Generates CI/CD-compatible JUnit Reports in XML format based on custom KPIs: Comparing aggregate metrics with threshold values determines pass/fail.
Supports filtering of sample labels by regular expressions.
Supported aggregates:
  • Response time percentiles (any)
  • Maximum and minimum response time
  • Response time average and standard deviation
  • Sample error rate
  • Total number of samples
  • Custom metrics

This CSV config plugin offers two distinctive features.
    1. The ability to provide CSV data only to specified Thread Groups
    2. The ability to designate the number of data records that can be used in each Thread.
        (Effect of unique data allocation.)
name: Unique CSV dataset config
UbikLoadPack GWT plugin
description: Plugin which provides the ability to easily script and performance test GWT based applications. It allows to Record and transform GWTRPC requests to XML, Out of the box transformation of requests from XML back to GWTRPC, On-demand transformation of responses from GWTRPC to XML for optional extraction, On-demand transformation of requests from Java objects back to GWTRPC, On-demand transformation of responses from GWTRPC to Java for optional extraction, Assertion on GWT response to check they are OK, View Results Tree renderer to test XPath extractions of data from GWTRPC responses

name: ElasticSearch backend listener
description:
Apache JMeter plugin for sending sample results to an ElasticSearch engine.
  • Simply add a "Backend Listener" and change the implementation
  • Change the listener's configuration
  • To use filters, simply seperate their name by a semicolon. (f1;f2;f3)

2.4.2.changes: Added string conversion to number for ElasticSearch

2.4.3.changes: Fixed class loader problem with JavaFX StringConverter class

2.5.0.changes: Switched to low-level client v6.4 & added custom variables support

2.5.1.changes: Added way of adding all response headers as well as request headers as ElasticSearch Index properties. (Basically JSON key/value pairs)

2.5.3.changes: Fixed error with filters (#2), refactored the method.

2.5.4.changes: Fixed error with filters (#37), refactored the method.

2.6.0.changes: Added AWS support, added RegExp support in filters, fixed bug with header parsing

2.6.1.changes: Fixed bug with header parsing (#40, thanks @ncasaux)

2.6.5.changes: New SSL feature, header parsing fixes, multiple little bug fixes.

2.6.6.changes: Fixed issue with index types ES 7.0+

2.6.7.changes: Fixed breaking issue with getElasticSearchVersion() method

2.6.8.changes: Fixed breaking issue with SSL conflicts

2.6.9.changes: Fixed breaking issue with SSL conflicts

2.6.10.changes: Fixed issue with sending variables through headers (#61)

2.6.11.changes: Fixed issue with deprecated methods resulting in errors and timeout issues

2.7.0.changes: Added an exclude feature for filters

name: JWT PreProcessor
description: This is a Jmeter pre-processor plugin that can generate Java Web Token

1.1.0.changes: Added PKCS#8 compatibility and bug fixes

name: UbikLoadPack Auto-correlator plugin
description: Plugin which provides the ability to easily load tests Vaadin, Oracle Siebel, Oracle PeopleSoft, Oracle Hyperion and Oracle JD-Edwards EntrepriseOne (JDE Eone) applications with Apache JMeter

name: Sample Retrier
description:
Post-Processor that retries failed samplers based on sample results (regex match of response code, data, headers or message).
  • Configurable pause and back-off behaviour
  • Handles "Retry-After" HTTP headers
  • Retries as represented as sub-results
Does not take into account any assertion results.

name: UbikLoadPack Video Streaming plugin
description: Plugin which provides the ability to easily load test servers delivering Adaptive Bitrate Streaming (ABR). It supports the following implementations: Low Latency Mpeg-Dash, Mpeg-Dash, Apple HLS / Low-Latency HLS (LL-HLS), HLS SGAI (Interstitials), Microsoft Smooth (HSS) and Adobe HDS. Both Live and VOD streams are automatically handled. The plugin realistically simulates players and outputs video specific metrics allowing you to analyze User Experience. It supports HTTP 1.1 and HTTP/2. It also allows to simulate CDN behaviour with Video Streams.

10.3.0.changes: Support for EXT-X-MAP tag in HLS and availabilityTimeOffset='INF' in DASH and bug fixes, full release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-10-3-0/

10.2.4.changes: Major release introducing support for HLS SGAI with Interstitials, full release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-10-2/

10.1.1.changes: Major release introducing support for HLS nPVR and audio-only streams, full release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-10-1-1/

10.0.0.changes: Major release introducing support for Ad Insertion and Java Virtual Threads, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-10-0-0/

9.1.6.changes: Enhancements and bug fixes, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-9-1-6

9.1.5.changes: Enhancements and bug fixes, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-9-1-5

9.1.3.changes: Trigger Low Latency Dash based on availabilityTimeComplete tag, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/release-of-ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-9-1/

9.1.2.changes: Introduce CDN Caching simulator, improve reporting, increase accuracy of simulation, bug fixes on DASH and audio streams, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/release-of-ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-9-1/

9.0.1.changes: Add support for HTTP/2, this version now requires JAVA 11 or higher, release notes at https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/release-of-ubikloadpack-video-streaming-plugin-9-1/

8.0.8.changes: Bugfix version for Show playlist in case of video manifest, fix NPE for Multiperiod DASH VOD

8.0.7.changes: Bugfix version for HLS and Dash subtitles and wrong first chunk download in HLS for certain types of manifest

8.0.6.changes: Bugfix version for HLS and Dash subtitles and wrong first chunk download in HLS for certain types of manifest

8.0.4.changes: Live DASH: Introduce option to follow redirect URL for Manifest Reload

8.0.2.changes: Bugfix version in Installer and HLS non master playlist detection

8.0.0.changes: Introduce support for Apple Low-Latency HLS (LL-HLS), see https://www.ubik-ingenierie.com/blog/performance-testing-low-latency-hls-servers/

7.2.8.changes: DASH and SMOTH: use play ahead for LIVE. DASH: add support for Trick mode in VOD Playback. Live Edge : Introduce option to allow following Live Edge on every reload or only at the playing start.

7.2.1.changes: Minor bugfix on test stop and detection of VOD

7.2.0.changes: Added support for Low Latency DASH

7.1.9.changes: Added ability to filter video streams by supported codec. Bugfixes

7.1.8.changes: Performance improvements. Bugfix for distributed testing

7.1.7.changes: VOD: Add the option to resume a video between iterations. VOD: Add option to start video at an offset. Some bugfixes

7.1.6.changes: Custom metrics graphs now use Percentile 95 for response times instead of mean. Improvements in error reporting + bugfixes

7.0.0.changes: Redesigned reporting to have live reporting and reporting per request type. New video metric. DASH : Added support to the Descriptor of the AdaptationSet, Added support for attribute suggestedPresentationDelay

6.6.0.changes: Let user choose the audio and subtitles track by the language/name of the track, handle EXT-X-MEDIA, handle subtitles, improve HTTPS performances, bugfixes

name: Atakama Variabilization Plugin
description:
Variabilization plugin for jmeter:

You can request a trial by following this link: https://ph-eval.atakama-technologies.com/downloadWebsite/index.php/product/show?id=1

name: Couchbase Plugin
HAR (HTTP Archive) Import
description: This plugin allows you to import HAR files into JMeter and convert them into HTTP Request Samplers for easier recording.

0.1.0.changes: Initial version for basic GET, POST, PUT, PATCH and DELETE request support. For more details see: https://github.com/Qytera-Gmbh/JMeterHARImporterPlugin/releases

0.2.0.changes: Several options for configuration added, e.g. en/disabling timers; host exclusion added; grouping of samplers. For more details see: https://github.com/Qytera-Gmbh/JMeterHARImporterPlugin/releases

0.2.1.changes: New way for adding think time. For more details see: https://github.com/Qytera-Gmbh/JMeterHARImporterPlugin/releases

0.2.2.changes: Fix think time calculation. For more details see: https://github.com/Qytera-Gmbh/JMeterHARImporterPlugin/releases

name: Rapi JMeter Plugins
description: This plugin can run Rapi Runner for front-end load testing while using JMeter and can parse .csv results to generate front-end load reports.

name: One-Click Auto-Correlation Plugin
description: One-click detection and correlation of dynamic values in JMeter test scripts. Automatically finds session IDs, CSRF tokens, OAuth/Bearer tokens, hidden form fields, ViewState, SAML tokens, and replaces hardcoded values with extractors.

1.0.1.changes: Initial release with correct package namespace (io.github.vasanthshanmugam).

name: Prism - tab-style interface plugin for Apache JMeter
description: A tab-style interface plugin for Apache JMeter

name: Coefficient of Variation and Modality Check
description: Checks for multimodality and the level of variation of the test results.

1.2.1.changes: Reduction of false positives by ensuring that the bin size is at least as large as the computed value.

name: ReportPortal backend listener
description:
JMeter Backend Listener ReportPortal is a JMeter plugin enabling you to send test results to a Report Portal server
  • get deatils on how to run report portal https://reportportal.io/
  • Simply add a Backend Listener
  • Change the listener's configuration

1.0.2.changes: Removed some of the unwanted codes and refactor the deprecated method used

name: SuperKey - JMeter Command Center
description: JMeter Command Center

name: JTL Excel Smart Report Generator
description: Generate Excel SLA reports from JTL result files with transaction-wise metrics and P90 SLA validation.

name: Distributed Load Distributor
description: Automatically distributes thread counts across JMeter generators for distributed testing. Works with JMeter remote testing (-R) via -Ggenerator.hosts, or standalone generators via -Jgenerator.id/-Jgenerator.count. Auto-activates from lib/ext — no test plan element required. Supports Standard ThreadGroup, Ultimate Thread Group, Concurrency Thread Group, and Stepping Thread Group.

1.2.0.changes: JMeter distributed testing support via -Ggenerator.hosts. Auto-detects slave hostname for ID assignment.

1.1.0.changes: Auto-activation via Function SPI — no test plan element required.

1.0.0.changes: Initial release. Requires Config Element in test plan.

name: LLM Metrics Visualizer
description: A JMeter listener plugin for monitoring LLM (Large Language Model) performance metrics in real time. Captures TTFT (Time to First Token), TPOT (Time per Output Token), RPS, input/output tokens per request and per minute, and response time percentiles — grouped by sampler name.

name: Swagger / Postman Importer
description: Imports Swagger/OpenAPI 2.0 and 3.0 specs (JSON and YAML) and Postman Collection v2.0/v2.1 files into a JMeter test plan. Supports all body modes (raw, urlencoded, formdata, GraphQL), Bearer, Basic, API Key and OAuth2 auth, nested folders with collection-level auth inheritance, and generates HTTP Header Managers per request.

1.0.changes: Initial release: Swagger/OpenAPI and Postman Collection importer.

name: Prometheus Listener Plugin
description: A Jmeter plugin to expose sampled metrics to an endpoint to be scraped by Prometheus.

name: GCP pubsub plugin
description:
Jmeter plugin to Publish and Subscribe Messages to GCP PubSub.
  • Simply add a "Publisher/Suscriber config " and provide the service credentials
  • Add the Publisher/Subscriber sampler to send/read events
  • Author Details

name: Apdex Score Calculation
description: Calculates the Apdex score of Samplers for a given Satisfied Threshold.

1.2.0.changes: Initial release - replaces Apdex & Coefficient of Variation plugin.

1.3.1.changes: Option to specify Apdex rules per transaction.

1.3.2.changes: Display of the average value in the results table to help understand the Apdex score.

name: Upper Outlier Removal
description: Detects outliers in the right tail using Tukey's fences and removes them.

1.0.0.changes: Initial release - replaces Right Tail Outlier Detector plugin.

1.2.2.changes: Trimming saved in two separate files: 1. clean results with successful & failed samplers 2. successful samplers only.

name: MCPLoadTester MCP Sampler
description: MCP sampler for stdio, HTTP, and HTTP+SSE transports

name: Markdown Table Data-driven Controller|JsonPath Assertion for sort

  • 'Console And Html Report' can gen beautiful html report and console report,It's useful for Jenkins saving log

1.1.changes: Consider ThreadGroup's setting: 'Action to be taken after a Sampler error'.

name: UbikLoadPack Observability Plugin
description: This plugin allows you to monitor your JMeter CLI performance test from your favorite browser without having to start JMeter in GUI mode

name: JAAR — JTL AI Analysis & Reporting
description: A file-based Apache JMeter listener plugin for post-test JTL analysis. Provides a filterable aggregate table with features like Filter Results using Start/End Offset & Transaction Names with RegEx support, Dynamic Percentile & Table Columns, SLA Threshold Highlighting, CLI Headless Mode, Chart Interval Control, AI-Analyzed HTML Performance Report, Export AI Report in Excel Format — with zero runtime overhead.

5.0.1.changes: fixed marker class and component class, removed old deprecated versions and kept only relevant meaningful version

name: Azure backend listener
description: Apache JMeter plugin that enables you to send test results to Azure Application Insights.

0.2.9.changes: Add more logging options for data payloads.

0.2.8.changes: Add new logSampleData option for logging response data.

0.2.7.changes: Add new logResponseData option for logging response data.
